title: Forget ‘Yellowstone,’ This Hit Appalachian Crime Series Is Coming Back With an Even Bigger Season 2
summary: Blue Ridge: The Series Season 2 premieres July 19 on INSP, bringing Johnathon Schaech back for new Appalachian mysteries and threats.

fullArticle: The rise in popularity of Western TV shows in recent years can be traced back to the premiere of Yellowstone, the Kevin Costner-led TV series written and produced by Taylor Sheridan. Yellowstone has become one of the most popular shows in the world over the last few years, and while spiritual predecessors like Longmire that came before are still popular, nothing has topped Sheridan’s original sweeping Western series. Yellowstone’s rise between 2018 and 2024 has forced the world’s biggest streaming services and networks to find replacement shows to capitalize on the demand for more neo-Western content — Netflix has settled on Ransom Canyon (starring Josh Duhamel) as its Yellowstone alternative, while Prime Video used two seasons of Outer Range to strike a Western chord.
